Vinnie’s Pizza.

alignments.json_text: Hi, can I please pick up a half cheese half mushroom pizza?

alignments.proposed_text: Hi! Could I please pick up a half cheese, [pitch-down] half mushroom pizza?

alignments.wiki_text: —[pitch & delay] Cheese, half mushroom?—
The who, now?

alignments.json_text: Station calling Joseph, Vinny, can I help you?
alignments.wiki_text: Thanks for calling Joe & Vinnie's! Can I help you?

alignments.json_text: Yeah, I'm trying to get that lasagna and salad.
alignments.wiki_text: Yeah, I’m trying to get that lasagna and, ah, salad, for pickup [sfx]—
alignments.proposed_text: Yeah, I’m trying to get that lasagna and, ah, salad, for pickup [sfx]—

alignments.json_text: Okay, let me tell you this.
alignments.wiki_text: —Okay, let me tell you this:—

alignments.json_text: If you call back here again, I got your number down, and I will be calling the police right now.
